parameters.subject: Missed Appointment with Dr. Sayuj
parameters.text:
Dear {{$node["Webhook Trigger"].json["body"]["patientName"]}},

We missed you at your scheduled appointment on {{$node["Webhook Trigger"].json["body"]["appointmentDate"]}}.

We understand that unexpected things come up. Your health is important to us, and we want to ensure you receive the care you need.

Please reschedule your appointment at your earliest convenience using this link: https://www.drsayuj.info/book

Warm regards,
Dr. Sayuj's Team
parameters.html:
We missed you!

Dear {{$node["Webhook Trigger"].json["body"]["patientName"]}},

We missed you at your scheduled appointment on {{$node["Webhook Trigger"].json["body"]["appointmentDate"]}}.

We understand that unexpected things come up. Your neurological health is important to us, and we want to ensure you receive the care you need.

Please reschedule your appointment at your earliest convenience:

Click here to reschedule your appointment

Warm regards,
Dr. Sayuj's Clinical Team
